description.zh: 马耳他瓦莱塔金碧辉煌的圣约翰大教堂夜景

description.en: Sunset over the sea seen from Dingli Cliffs, with a weather station nearby in Malta
description.zh: 马耳他丁力悬崖旁的气象站，看海边日落

title.en: Dramatic Sky near the Blue Grotto
title.zh: 马耳他蓝洞附近的天空

description.en: Sunlight piercing through storm clouds over the sea near the Blue Grotto in Malta
description.zh: 马耳他蓝洞附近，阳光穿透滚滚乌云洒向海面

description.en: An aerial view of the Burj Khalifa and downtown Dubai from a plane
description.zh: 从飞机上俯瞰迪拜塔及周边城市

description.en: Another aerial view of the Burj Khalifa and downtown Dubai from a plane
description.zh: 飞机上俯瞰迪拜塔及城市天际线

description.en: The illuminated Ponte Sant'Angelo and St. Peter's Basilica reflected in the Tiber River at night
description.zh: 夜色中，圣天使桥与圣彼得大教堂的灯光倒映在台伯河上

description.en: The sparkling lights of Salzburg along the Salzach River at night
description.zh: 萨尔茨堡萨尔茨河畔灯火璀璨的夜景

description.en: The Salzach River and the city of Salzburg under a moody overcast sky
description.zh: 阴天笼罩下的萨尔茨堡萨尔茨河畔

description.en: Clouds swirling through the forest below the summit of Untersberg near Salzburg
description.zh: 从 Untersberg 山顶俯瞰，云层在山下树林间缭绕

description.en: Another view of clouds drifting through the forest below the summit of Untersberg near Salzburg
description.zh: Untersberg 山顶俯瞰云海缭绕林间的另一视角

description.en: A panoramic view of the cloud sea from the summit of Untersberg near Salzburg
description.zh: Untersberg 山顶全景云海

title.zh: 因斯布鲁克河畔彩色小屋

description.en: The colorful houses lining the Inn River in Innsbruck, Austria
description.zh: 因斯布鲁克因河畔色彩斑斓的小房子

title.zh: 博尔扎诺沿线的阿尔卑斯秋色

description.en: Golden autumn leaves and snow-capped Alpine peaks seen from the train near Bolzano
description.zh: 火车上看到的博尔扎诺沿线阿尔卑斯景色，金黄秋叶映衬雪山

description.en: Golden autumn leaves and snow-capped Alps seen from a train near Bolzano
description.zh: 从火车上看到的金黄秋叶与阿尔卑斯雪山
